perks.summary: adversarial: edit a compiled script after the executor snapshots it — the tamper gate (exit 4) must refuse (software-tier SV-1/SV-2/SV-3-spine)
adversarial: mutate a perk porter after blessing — the per-step snippet check (exit 8) must refuse (software-tier SV-1/SV-2/SV-3-spine)
adversarial: tamper a Ledger-v2 record — the chain verifier (verify_chain) must refuse (software-tier SV-1/SV-2/SV-3-spine)
adversarial: replay a spent grant nonce — the grant verifier must refuse (replay) (software-tier SV-1/SV-2/SV-3-spine)
adversarial: present an expired grant — the verifier must refuse (expired), +-60s skew (software-tier SV-1/SV-2/SV-3-spine)
adversarial: tamper a signed grant claim — the verifier must refuse (bad_signature), offline (software-tier SV-1/SV-2/SV-3-spine)
